untranslatable_reason: Diamond Bottom pattern detection requires visual/structural pattern recognition (minor highs/lows touching trend lines, formation geometry). The allowed indicators cannot directly identify trend line touches or pattern completion geometry. Donchian channels used as proxy for breakout detection, but true diamond bottom formation validation is not expressible with available indicators.
translation_notes: Pattern requires: (1) downtrend preceding formation - detectable via price/MA relationships; (2) minor highs/lows touching trend lines - NOT detectable with allowed indicators; (3) upward breakout - approximated using Donchian upper band cross. Exit uses Donchian middle as reversal signal. Throwback mentioned (53%) cannot be modeled. Success rate 73% and 36% average rise noted from source but not translatable to rule conditions.
